mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO response_items (response_id, field_id, value) VALUES
(#{it.responseId}, #{it.fieldId}, #{it.value})
mapper.select:
SELECT id, response_id, field_id, value FROM response_items WHERE response_id IN
#{rid}
SELECT ri.id, ri.response_id, ri.field_id, ri.value FROM response_items ri JOIN responses r ON r.id = ri.response_id WHERE r.form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY r.submitted_at DESC, ri.id
